mapper.sql: id, permission_name, permission_code, permission_type, parent_id, route_path, component_path, icon, sort_no, visible, description, deleted, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM `permission`
deleted = 0
AND permission_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{permissionName}, '%')
ORDER BY sort_no ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `permission`
deleted = 0
AND permission_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{permissionName}, '%')

SELECT
FROM `permission` WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM `permission` WHERE permission_code = #{permissionCode} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM `permission` WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_no ASC, id ASC

SELECT
FROM `permission` WHERE deleted = 0 AND permission_type = 'MENU' AND visible = 1 ORDER BY sort_no ASC, id ASC

SELECT DISTINCT p.id, p.permission_name, p.permission_code, p.permission_type, p.parent_id, p.route_path, p.component_path, p.icon, p.sort_no, p.visible, p.description, p.deleted, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM `permission` p INNER JOIN role_permission rp ON rp.permission_id = p.id INNER JOIN user_role ur ON ur.role_id = rp.role_id INNER JOIN `role` r ON r.id = ur.role_id AND r.deleted = 0 WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND p.deleted = 0 AND p.permission_type = 'MENU' AND p.visible = 1 ORDER BY p.sort_no ASC, p.id ASC

SELECT DISTINCT p.permission_code FROM `permission` p INNER JOIN role_permission rp ON rp.permission_id = p.id INNER JOIN user_role ur ON ur.role_id = rp.role_id INNER JOIN `role` r ON r.id = ur.role_id AND r.deleted = 0 WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND p.deleted = 0 ORDER BY p.permission_code ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `permission` WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `permission` ( permission_name, permission_code, permission_type, parent_id, route_path, component_path, icon, sort_no, visible, description, deleted ) VALUES ( #{permissionName}, #{permissionCode}, #{permissionType}, #{parentId}, #{routePath}, #{componentPath}, #{icon}, #{sortNo}, #{visible}, #{description}, 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE `permission`
permission_name = #{permissionName}, permission_code = #{permissionCode}, permission_type = #{permissionType}, parent_id = #{parentId}, route_path = #{routePath}, component_path = #{componentPath}, icon = #{icon}, sort_no = #{sortNo}, visible = #{visible}, description = #{description}, deleted = #{deleted},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE `permission` SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
